name: ground_truth_ac7_lockout_threshold_nc
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 44, CCI-000044, assessed 2026-05-27). Non-Compliant verdict — system failed lockout threshold test. Narrative uses 'Examined/Finding' structure. The phrase 'failed test' and 'did not engage' describe a clear compliance gap. Similar to the AC-6 ground-truth sibling: 'did not engage' may not appear in _GAP_PHRASES, while 'Examined' hits _AFFIRMING_PHRASES — potentially triggering STATUS_NARRATIVE_MISMATCH and driving to abstain. If the validator does reject, this pins the gap; if it accepts (because 'failed test' or 'did not' is covered), it pins the happy path. UPDATE 2026-06-18: the _GAP_PHRASES coverage gap this case documented is now FIXED — the 'Examined/Finding' gap wording classifies GAP_DESCRIBING, so the human-verified Non-Compliant verdict is ACCEPTED on the first pass instead of being forced to an abstain by status_narrative_mismatch.

ccis_row.guidance: 000044: The information system enforces the organization-defined limit of consecutive invalid logon attempts by a user during the organization-defined time period.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment examines the information system to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed configures the information system to limit invalid logon attempts by a user to three attempts during a 15 minute time period.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Account lockout test results — manual test of invalid logon attempt enforcement at the system boundary.
- Access control policy — signed policy defining lockout threshold parameters (3 attempts / 15 minutes).

Finding:
System failed test - account lockout did not engage at the defined threshold.
